reminder.message: It is! And I get to take walks in the canyon before I start my work, which is a nice way to start the day.
We should get together sometime and do something active!
Hey, I'm a single mom working two jobs to support my children. What about you?

emotional_support.message: I'm doing great! I'm a fulltime student studying radiology at a local college and I also play in a band that my parents don't know about.
Nice! I've been meaning to try yoga but I've never really had the time.
I'm doing great! I just got a new teaching job and I'm really excited about it.

action_item.message: That's a cool hobby. I need to learn to take responsibility for my own actions and stop blaming others.
I like the band Queens of the Stone Age.

small_talk.message: I'll have to try it sometime! What about your Impala?
That's awesome! I love classic cars.
